title: auricula-ursi allionii
intro: Auricula-ursi allionii, also known as bearberry, is a low-growing evergreen shrub native to northern parts of Europe, Asia, and North America. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its arbutin content, a compound that has antimicrobial and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of bearberry include its ability to support urinary tract health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular herbal remedy for treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and kidney stones. Bearberry can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
